title: diphasiastrum alpinum var. planiramulosum
intro: Diphasiastrum alpinum var. planiramulosum is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Alaskan forked polypody, a type of club moss found in the mountainous regions of the northern hemisphere. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, and its antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Diphasiastrum alpinum var. planiramulosum include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce fever. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying the leaves and stems, and then using them in infusions or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
